german_requirement.title: German Language Requirement is Not Dominant
german_requirement.subtitle: A significant portion of roles do not require German, highlighting accessibility issues.

pm_type.title: Core PMs Dominate, Leaving Customer-Facing Roles Behind
pm_type.subtitle: A significant gap exists between Core and Customer-facing PM positions, indicating a concentration in generalist roles.

seniority.title: Senior Roles Dominate the Market
seniority.subtitle: Over half of the positions are filled by senior-level professionals.

work_mode.title: Flexibility in Work Modes Remains Uncertain
work_mode.subtitle: A significant portion of roles lacks clear classification, with mixed preferences for remote, hybrid, and onsite arrangements.

location.title: Berlin Dominates Job Market Concentration
location.subtitle: A significant majority of opportunities are concentrated in Berlin, limiting remote access.

ai.title: AI Expertise is Becoming Mainstream
ai.subtitle: 42% of roles prioritize AI responsibilities, with 41% requiring AI skills.

industry.title: Industry Roles Exhibit Notable Diversity
industry.subtitle: A balanced pattern indicates a lack of dominant roles, but unclassified positions raise concerns about accessibility.
